summary: Tested Address Manager improvements in Account page: PIN Code field order, auto-fetch functionality, Title Case, and read-only City/State fields. All features working correctly.

details: Field order verified: Pincode → City → State (left to right in grid)
Pincode is the first field in the location row
City and State are positioned after Pincode
Entering 110001 (Delhi) auto-fills: City='Central Delhi', State='Delhi'
Entering 400001 (Mumbai) auto-fills: City='Mumbai', State='Maharashtra'
Entering 560001 (Bangalore) auto-fills: City='Bangalore', State='Karnataka'
Invalid PIN (123456) clears City/State and shows error toast
Uses external API: https://api.postalpincode.in/pincode/{pincode}
Toast notifications show 'Found: {City}, {State}' on success
Name field: 'john smith kumar' → 'John Smith Kumar'
Address Line 1: '123 main street, block a' → '123 Main Street, Block A'
Address Line 2: 'near central park' → 'Near Central Park'
Nickname field also supports Title Case (via capitalizeWords function)
City field has readOnly attribute (verified via JavaScript)
State field has readOnly attribute (verified via JavaScript)
Both fields have 'bg-gray-100' and 'cursor-not-allowed' CSS classes
Placeholder shows 'Auto-filled' to guide users
POST /api/user/addresses successfully creates new address
Address saved with all Title Case fields preserved
Toast shows 'Address saved successfully'
New address appears in address list immediately
GET /api/user/addresses returns list of saved addresses
Addresses retrieved correctly with all fields
Address cards display correct information

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ capitalizeWords function correctly implements Title Case (line 18-21 in AddressManager.jsx)
✓ fetchCityStateFromPincode uses correct Indian postal API
✓ City and State inputs have readOnly attribute and visual styling
✓ Field order is correct: Pincode (col 1) → City (col 2) → State (col 3)
✓ Helper text 'City & State auto-fill' shown below Pincode field
✓ Error handling for invalid PIN codes works correctly
seed_data_creation: Test 'Office' address was created and deleted during testing. Existing 'Home' address retained.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Address Manager improvements verified: PIN code field order (Pincode → City → State), auto-fetch from Indian postal API, Title Case for Name/Address fields, City and State read-only. Test user has one 'Home' address with Delhi PIN 110001.
